summary: Frontend-only verification of new ADDONS tab on AppDetail + /app/apps/:id/heatmaps route. All requested flows passed.
verified_flows: Login as demo@deployunit.com / demo1234 succeeded; landed on /app
Dynamic app discovery via GET /api/workspaces + /api/apps?workspace_id=... -> first app id 63c1ba3c-8286-4e80-83d1-06a603132392 (next.js)
AppDetail loads with [data-testid='app-detail']; overview tab default and Deploy CTA visible
tab-addons trigger renders [data-testid='app-addons'] with three cards: addon-card-log-retention, addon-card-heatmaps, addon-card-static-ip
Heatmaps card shows ACTIVE status pill, renews-in-30-days text, [data-testid='heatmap-snippet-copy'] and [data-testid='heatmap-open-viewer'] both visible
Click addon-enable-static-ip -> POST /api/apps/{id}/addons/static-ip/enable observed with status 200; sonner toast rendered
heatmap-open-viewer navigates to /app/apps/:id/heatmaps; [data-testid='heatmaps-page'] renders inside DashboardLayout (sidebar nav present); no double-layout / crash
Date range buttons heatmaps-range-7/14/30/90 all clickable; heatmap-url-list renders (1 URL '/test'), is_active=true, no empty/inactive state shown
Regression: overview tab still loads, tab-deployments and tab-settings switch without errors
critical_code_review_comments: Non-blocking React warning observed in console: a 'key' prop is being spread into <UsageBar /> via JSX spread (unrelated to this iteration's addons/heatmaps wiring, but worth fixing in the component that maps over usage entries).
AddonsCard catches load errors silently (sets addons=[]) — consider surfacing a small inline error instead of an indistinguishable empty list.
seed_data_creation: None; relied on existing seeded demo workspace+app (heatmaps already active, 1 page '/test' with click events).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Addons tab wiring + /app/apps/:id/heatmaps route fully working as of iteration 21. The Heatmaps.jsx fix (removing nested DashboardLayout) is confirmed — page renders inside the parent /app outlet without sidebar duplication or runtime errors.
